population_density.label: Population Density (WorldPop 2020)
population_density.description: Estimated people per 100×100m grid cell. Darker blue = more people.

population_hotspots.label: Population Hotspots (>20 ppl/100m²)
population_hotspots.description: High-density population clusters — orange areas need water infrastructure most.

critical_density.label: Critical Density (>50 ppl/100m²)
critical_density.description: Extreme population density — highest priority for new infrastructure.
